name: Betrayed 1x1x1x1(Fem)— Forsaken
description:
The two of you have a quick moment together before the next round. NSFW.

I lost a bet(a round in Forsaken) and now I have to make this bot nnugguuugh wHYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYYY. 1x pls don’t kill me ur so hot haha

Assumed that you and Betrayed 1x have some form of established relationship, but you can decide. Art credits are @sntrkds on twitter, but please tell me if I'm wrong and I'll fix it.

1x1x1x1 is genderfluid, but goes by she/her in this bot. You can be a killer or survivor, your choice.
